creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Port devel/git-lfs diff from 2.4.2 to 2.5.1

Changes:
    https://github.com/git-lfs/git-lfs/releases/tag/v2.5.1

QA: poudriere testport passed for 10.4-RELEASE-p9 and 11.2-RELEASE-p0
    both on i386 and amd64 architectures

Note: The building procedure has been largely changed from v2.4.2.
      gmake is required in the release Makefile,
      so I added gmake to USES.

Note 2: On 2.5.1 some of my fixes are included in the original distribution.
        The Makefile is modified as well.
